verses.text: A beating is limited to forty stripes, lest your brother seem vile. Limit. Even punishment has dignity.
A beating is limited to forty stripes, lest your brother seem vile. Limit. Even punishment has dignity.
A beating is limited to forty stripes, lest your brother seem vile. Limit. Even punishment has dignity.
Muzzle not the ox that treads out the corn. The ox. The worker shares the fruit.
A brother shall raise up seed to the dead. Levirate. The dead man's name is kept.
A brother shall raise up seed to the dead. Levirate. The dead man's name is kept.
If he refuses, his shoe is loosed and his house shamed. Refusal. Duty to family is honoured.
If he refuses, his shoe is loosed and his house shamed. Refusal. Duty to family is honoured.
If he refuses, his shoe is loosed and his house shamed. Refusal. Duty to family is honoured.
If he refuses, his shoe is loosed and his house shamed. Refusal. Duty to family is honoured.
A law of modesty in a quarrel is given. Modesty. Decency is guarded.
A law of modesty in a quarrel is given. Modesty. Decency is guarded.
Use just weights and measures; God hates the false. Honesty. Fair dealing pleases God.
Use just weights and measures; God hates the false. Honesty. Fair dealing pleases God.
Use just weights and measures; God hates the false. Honesty. Fair dealing pleases God.
Use just weights and measures; God hates the false. Honesty. Fair dealing pleases God.
Remember Amalek; blot out their remembrance. Amalek. God repays cruelty.
